C3-FM-01: restate the last count word as the answer
ask how many altogether immediately after counting
C3-FM-02: rehearse stopping after the final count word
use teacher echo of the last count as the answer
build confidence with small fixed sets
C3-FM-03: rearrange the same objects without changing the set
ask whether anything was added or removed
compare before-and-after layouts with fixed totals
C3-FM-04: shift gradually from objects to pictures and stories
anchor each context back to concrete set models
identify which objects belong to the counted set
